---
title: Accordion
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/layout/accordion/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/accordion/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 300
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-mFS+GrVbX1DxEAYX2hw6my6ZwuQxGY1YEyaQOe+n0AAFVBoGFgqPwKPoNHRxtUGnA1A5Wi8ssIKAoGBE6O4APK+CIVH4OVgJZAgbiKCgfUkAX3c+kIqAouF8tDAWIoYH5MSAA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEG1ACZwGRAK6cAOhFUZ0AfSXIAvMiU4oAczia6AGyXSAFKuQODnLFGJkG0zuRsOAxMgAeAPtHUMNXd09yTXQoCDgLOzAAZThiCi8IMWVCZBzk5jhkaAYGKAyANyK6ITY0jPJssABKAhDQh3C3ISiIGLiEpNT0zOQAIRyifMLiqFLyzirkGoY6kcaJlrasjs7nCJ7M-vjE-PrRgGFJvJSZkrLK6trWc8arrfaOzmldHIjJz6hUjoai6YBndZZUQ5AC621CrU+hlICgo6FRmioAA8KJoqgwAEYLGBJF4WepwaQ5REQZqqekQWR0OoMfE2bjoihEFFo1FEF6sViZZqIT4AASkjLkWGxFE+TLq5PSlJsIsBjikFAUDCydByAHkQVlYicbKwRcgQBzUS43KqAL45BnqTB6MSYGwabScflyfF0iC5MAUXAg2jBuA4sD2mFAA
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.accordion
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.accordion.html
    signature: ui.accordion(*args, id=None, open=None, multiple=True, class_=None,
      width=None, height=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.accordion_panel
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.accordion_panel.html
    signature: ui.accordion_panel(title, *args, value=MISSING, icon=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.update_accordion
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.update_accordion.html
    signature: ui.update_accordion(id, *, show, session=None)
  - title: ui.update_accordion_panel
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.update_accordion_panel.html
    signature: ui.update_accordion_panel(id, target, *body, title=MISSING, value=MISSING,
      icon=MISSING, show=None, session=None)
  - title: ui.insert_accordion_panel
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.insert_accordion_panel.html
    signature: ui.insert_accordion_panel(id, panel, target=None, position="after",
      session=None)
  - title: ui.remove_accordion_panel
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.remove_accordion_panel.html
    signature: ui.remove_accordion_panel(id, target, session=None)
- id: variation-update-panel
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/accordion/
  contents:
  - title: Update a panel
    description: Call `ui.update_accordion_panel()` from the server to change a panel's
      title, body, or open state. Give the accordion an `id` and each panel a stable
      `value` so you can target it.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-update-panel-preview.py
      height: 350
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-update-panel-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkDOFGIVOANzgAdCI2ZsuPLHAAe6Ma1Z8BQkd3QBXCkROcFCy1mNmA+qwDunCsXYAKOWBPoAJlBUDuhQEHAANj5EPgCqAUFwyJ5h-sik6NQAlGxwkpzkrD5Z1hCuFOzIthJkDP4FEJ6c-gC8PjXRyDAmEVLoEXAtACoMJnBZiArI08h0QsgDFFQMfBDIPgCCAEIAwj6TazNH5ZXVxLX15CFhkZ50PgDKeVLkyCCLywC+ndJQEWMte5gVh5BzvOBLOAMb5gCZTI4I6ZAh7MJLQBgMIIyJJzFYg-KvcGQ6E+UoKAACYgkUlk6jodGeFKp+VpcFklCaEFMFCwfkCwVC4QiJQg-jgdGQDk8cMO0woGhELXWYGSfMS-hKKs4EvsPLVApuEWlyEiIOVpNlKlIzmQSoARqRSEbdbyEgahcaAKTIABMtqVAEYRUdcQsIctVsrtnskPDEbZ9XAHDUhJcINcPdMAMTIAA8ubjiJm7XO0ULRdmPnxYI+UJhBHLReRqJA8oon2Q6MxNJx83xLzWRK+ZctFakFAGgMezwab1r0NbCvrjcRHGtLTXzgbo5mIsIqAouEytDAVAVYE+AF0gA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-update-panel-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-mAkn14hxSLd1sgAEakUh2ZOpj1faJ2WEAUmQACZ1hsAIw+kqlZrU3K03OMllIAu9za1z6mDFhDJeuyeADEyAAPKvxxOvNziMQ5sGtwkkhNiFMB7NegfD6UkskKiAwxQ8lUoDU6gpKhS4W1Mueeijr17OQKGFMpUnhX9SXyB9w3-TdDyLW4RkQgDAOlRYMHQUtxHQMEVlUbVckVaVCFQChcGhWgwCocMwDyVkgA
- id: variation-insert-remove
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/accordion/
  contents:
  - title: Insert and remove panels
    description: Call `ui.insert_accordion_panel()` and `ui.remove_accordion_panel()`
      from the server to add or drop panels while the app is running.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-insert-remove-preview.py
      height: 350
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-insert-remove-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-PcsqxQV4ofVwhAohiJmAgcw4MhoAwGFApHM6EI2KDEuiUWsyCZKMhjqJxGDZFgYXCghCGhA1gABMTtNlwOh0SkKAUsklwdSyShBFrbXIjWo87Ii5BeUJojHopl0+UhZAAakh72QBooWERFCCEB5GOagTgwjaxF2fwgKuKQUiAGJkAAeQPmjFnd2lUNROhZEFg8jIEAQAC+kfRmMiMexuPxUEJxJkeLJDAp8fRSdThCjkQBXg5L2OWcRxC8FbTGJ5-MFrJlIrFkgl3elsuotsVAyGcG9LjVGq1b3TkT1Fs8hvNnDo+OQAD5kAAGHUZrYT4Y-PYHad9c6EZBNpFt1aLzGW61wW3ogC0kJ5N7AFFw6AICgf6aBQYDJgAukAA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-insert-remove-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEGcKMQqcAbnCIBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5kqnFADmcHXQA2qgCYAKDchfHOWa1FyllFHWVsYCFYnCFdwtyxudF8dGTlyHQAjXwpyJzQ7Ox10KAg4azVCZCLRLORc--fW2O8rB9AaWC4Jlzu5Ce72V1x+iM+QPhzjssIAPmQAAMkovo0JhXoMNZnBAWaXGWeLdgiSKrrU64uJG0ZwLGYQALQvNumraHK4joA42h6JwRCIpyKYasUYAULg6AICg9FwAAHhQYAdgAukAA
- id: kitchen-sink
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-kitchen-sink.ejs
  contents:
  - title: Accordion
    core: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#h=0&-vtkm5ItEMs8unkCrdimAAMLkOjsaQWBhQWrka5wlLqdAWCgSHzsUwMN71QjwgBqxwscAayAADEQAIxMlnIACsTOBgIORxOZzAXBRckIIOaT0e4ik0jenigDD+AOafOaYLSMTqWRyMMlRRKACU4NwJhRuDi4W5SISCUSqAAPImSMxDTH8N5GM2TFUGwqC+nC73my0S-lSrgyzJyt7EFRKigAWm4-HQqz9EdC6qKpOF4KthX61CcwHOFVIjJKIcmYYAuqqijBzex06dWgx6Y3CsQfFBuNwxMKYLgkwBmQvJeakigqYXspkAUknSRUcFRKgowp5TPQjsnOZCNrthLETpdbo9MDexahep8Yb5vxs9QgY2UZld5PxhKItoo9pENwpqpuQvyICCAACRhvmYWDniC741hQATgf6yBGBQ6KJHQJSJC4IA-hQWAQKhAC+JQvkk0EmHBCH8u+t66t03CoRBWYhJh2GsCUADyAyJNC+TcOByCERA9qpMQ5GUa+tiYM4yD6OgAR2A47BAZ+ZjPhAVJgBQuADLQ+lwM6YBkXWQA
    express: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#h=0&-wARqRSABrBJXG53eoJDpqXhfH6lPi8dLUZBY3DIBxsJrIb52ZQqUjuXhQZBtKAhCDSZEQLAJNw7eZeHx+AJBd4QT7fX7-ADC5DoBwsDCgEIgUJhcISXB1ciRaIgqPEGP+0jgUAYhOJMvqTyw6ksFAkpXYDgY-yNSISADUTXACqsiGsY8gzldpfUHvLnoq3qEVVT1STogkAEoGJqVJHQ2HtIrF8qlojW23omT-YgqZ0UCbcYxtQl3N15qIAAVsgawVG0FH7LLgdGQxSaYTdHqXs7gFD1dToCTqsWQIG9ViwEAXAF8pUbz0PqCOxxP7NPkPTs2rStwF7d3fo1wwNwkAPIZOocz+bgbl3fcKBeYgTzPJEwAoXAMloOCdAoMBjyqIA
    image: thumbnail.png
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

An accordion is a set of vertically stacked, collapsible panels. It lets you organize a lot of content into compact sections that the user can expand one at a time (or several at once), which is handy for sidebars, settings, and long forms.

To make an accordion:

  1. Create the container with `ui.accordion()`.

  2. Add one `ui.accordion_panel()` for each section. The first positional argument is the panel `title`; the remaining arguments are the panel's body content.

  3. Give the accordion an `id` if you want to read which panels are currently open. In the server, `input.<id>()` returns the `value`(s) of the open panel(s). A panel's `value` defaults to its `title`, but you can set an explicit `value` so your server code does not break when a title changes.

### Controlling which panels are open

Use the `open` argument to set the initial state:

- `open=None` (the default) opens the first panel.
- `open="Section B"` (or a list of values) opens specific panels.
- `open=True` opens every panel and `open=False` closes them all.

By default `multiple=True`, so users can expand several panels at once. Set `multiple=False` to make the accordion behave like a single-selection group, where opening one panel closes the others.

### Panel icons and sizing

Pass `icon` to `ui.accordion_panel()` to place an element (such as a [Font Awesome](https://fontawesome.com/) icon from `faicons`) just before the title. Use the accordion's `width` and `height` arguments to constrain its size; when `height` is set the panel bodies scroll within the accordion.

:::{#variation-update-panel}
:::

### Adding and removing panels dynamically

Panels do not have to be fixed at startup. From the server you can:

- `ui.update_accordion_panel(id, target, ...)` — change a panel's title, body, icon, value, or open state.
- `ui.update_accordion(id, show=...)` — open or close panels by value.
- `ui.insert_accordion_panel(id, panel, target=None, position="after")` — add a new panel.
- `ui.remove_accordion_panel(id, target)` — remove one or more panels by value.

:::{#variation-insert-remove}
:::

:::{#kitchen-sink}
:::

See also: [Card](../cards/index.qmd) | [Toolbar](../toolbar/index.qmd)
